title: zanthoxylum hillebrandii
intro: Zanthoxylum hillebrandii, also known as the Hawaiian prickly ash, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions due to the presence of compounds like limonoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum hillebrandii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, with the roots and stems being the most commonly used parts.
